---
body-classes: posts-page
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: ["title", "date"]

# Makes the whole blog feel a bit more cohesive since the differnt page
# component no longer move when navigating between, e.g. the home page and 
# posts page
page-layout: article
title-block-banner: false
---
